case_title: NANCY LIAO ET AL VS. TH INVERNESS

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-04-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NANCY LIAO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF KATHERINE DONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT INVERNESS APARTMENTS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINA SUTTON, RESIDENT MANAGER. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $4075 TO THE PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAY-04-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFFS ARE NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT INVERNESS APARTMENTS TO MAKE SURE CASE WAS DISMISSED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LIAO, NANCY DONG, KATHERINE AS TO DEFENDANT INVERNESS APARTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2021 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT INVERNESS APARTMENTS
REMARK: RETURN MAIL-CONTINUE ORDER SENT TO TH INVERNESS -INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS/UNABLE TO FORWARD
